title: Scrum Master
description:
• Growth-focused environment
  • Strong agile culture

About Our Client

The hiring company is a well-established organisation in the Insurance sector with a strong presence in Singapore. It is recognised for its focus on innovation and delivering efficient solutions through advanced technology.

Job Description

  • Facilitate daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives for agile teams.
  • Support the team in identifying and removing any impediments to progress.
  • Ensure effective collaboration between team members and stakeholders.
  • Promote agile practices and principles within the organisation.
  • Monitor and track the progress of sprints and ensure deliverables are met on time.
  • Assist in the prioritisation and management of the product backlog.
  • Provide coaching and guidance to team members on agile methodologies.
  • Ensure proper documentation and reporting of team progress and outcomes.

The Successful Applicant

A successful Scrum Master should have:

  • Proven experience in agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.
  • Strong understanding of technology processes and frameworks.
  • Ability to manage multiple stakeholders effectively.
  • Excellent communication and facilitation skills.
  • Capability to drive continuous improvement within teams.

What's on Offer

  • Opportunities to work within a leading Insurance industry organisation in Singapore.
  • Temporary position offering exposure to exciting projects in the technology department.
  • Collaborative work culture with a focus on leveraging innovative practices.



If you are an experienced Scrum Master with a passion for the Insurance industry, this opportunity in Singapore could be the perfect fit for you. Apply now to make a meaningful impact!
